heroDesc: The lightweight, distraction-free version of ChanoX2.
whyChooseDesc: For users who prefer simplicity and speed over extensive features.
featureStreamlinedDesc: A clean, no-nonsense interface that gets out of your way. Focus on your games, not the launcher.
featureEfficiencyDesc: Optimized for lower-end hardware or minimalists. Uses significantly less RAM and CPU in the background.
